ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calculations" (
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "number" TEXT /* The number for which the calculations are performed */,
  "square" TEXT /* The square of the number */,
  "cube" TEXT /* The cube of the number */,
  "square_root" TEXT /* The square root of the number */,
  "cube_root" TEXT /* The cube root of the number */,
  "calculated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calculation */,
  "calculated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the calculation was performed */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculations_calculated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calculated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mathematician, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., R&D, engineering) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calculation being tracked */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the calculation before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the calculation after the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_history_calc_id FOREIGN KEY ("calc_id") REFERENCES calculations ("calc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_calculations" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch calculation */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch calculation */,
  "start_number" TEXT /* Starting number of the batch */,
  "end_number" TEXT /* Ending number of the batch */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Number of calculations in the batch */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the batch */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the batch was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_calculations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch detail */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch calculation */,
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual calculation */,
  "number" TEXT /* The number for which the calculations are performed */,
  "square" TEXT /* The square of the number */,
  "cube" TEXT /* The cube of the number */,
  "square_root" TEXT /* The square root of the number */,
  "cube_root" TEXT /* The cube root of the number */,
  "calculated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calculation */,
  "calculated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the calculation was performed */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_details_calculated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calculated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_details_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batch_calculations ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calculation */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch calculation (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calculation */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., individual, batch) */,
  "number" TEXT /* The number for which the calculations are performed */,
  "square" TEXT /* The square of the number */,
  "cube" TEXT /* The cube of the number */,
  "square_root" TEXT /* The square root of the number */,
  "cube_root" TEXT /* The cube root of the number */,
  "calculated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the calculation was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_logs_calc_id FOREIGN KEY ("calc_id") REFERENCES calculations ("calc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batch_calculations ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "can_read" INTEGER /* Permission to read calculations */,
  "can_write" INTEGER /* Permission to write calculations */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete calculations */,
  "can_batch_process" INTEGER /* Permission to perform batch calculations */,
  "can_view_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to view reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, comparison) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data and configuration for the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "performed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log entry */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., data visualization, machine learning) */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "performed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
